name: tts-reader
title: TTS Reader
description: Text-to-speech reader powered by any TTS provider
author: andypai

commands.name: read-selected-text
commands.title: Read Selected Text
commands.description: Immediately reads the selected text or clipboard content without confirmation.

commands.name: read-text-editor
commands.title: Read Text with Editor
commands.description: Opens an editor to review and modify text before reading aloud.

commands.name: onboarding
commands.title: Get Started
commands.description: Onboarding and configuration for TTS Reader.

preferences.name: voice
preferences.title: Voice
preferences.description: Voice name to use for speech synthesis.

preferences.name: speed
preferences.title: Speed
preferences.description: Playback speed (0.25-4.0). Requires ffmpeg when not 1.0.

preferences.name: outputFormat
preferences.title: Output Format
preferences.description: Audio format for output files. Requires ffmpeg when not WAV.

preferences.name: saveAudioFiles
preferences.title: Save Audio Files
preferences.description: Save generated audio files to ~/.cache/raycast-tts/ for debugging and reuse.
preferences.label: Save Audio Files

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
